WRIT MAY ISSUE F/W. STAY EXECUTION TO 6/1/94. RENT $4,500 FROM DEC. '93 THRU MAY 31, 94. PLTF. TO HAVE $1,000.00 ATTY. FEES AND $245.00 COSTS. TOTAL PRINCIPAL $5,745.00. DEFT. TO INFORM PLTF. ATTY. BY MAY 6, 1994 INFORMATION: PROBATE ON ANTOINETTE ROSSI, NAME, PHONE, VENUE, CASE # FOR STAY OF EVICTION 6/1/94. DEFT. TO VACATE NOON 5/31/94. IF DEFT. PAYS BY 5PM ON 5/29/94 PLTF. TO WAIVE INTEREST ON PRINCIPLE. OTHERWISE, PLTF. TO PUT LIEN ON ESTATE OF ANTOINETTE ROSSIE. DEFT. WAIVES SEC. DEPOSIT. DEFT. TO RECEIVE CREDIT ON PRINCIPLE AS TO SEC. DEPOSIT. BROOM CLEAN. SOLE OCCUPANT.RELEASE FUTURE CLAIMS. PERS. PROP. ABANDONED. DEFT. WAIVES STAY OF EXECUTION.
